[[File:StS2 Gold.png|frame|'''Money Pouch:''' Shows how much {{KW|Gold||2}} you are carrying.]]{{#setmainimage:StS2 Gold.png|quiet}}
Gold is the currency of {{2|Main|Slay the Spire 2}}. The player starts each run with 99 {{KW|Gold||2}}. It is used to purchase from the {{2|Merchant}} or from various {{2|Events}}.

== Sources ==

=== Combat ===
* {{2|Monsters}} drop 10-20 ({{Asc|3|8-15|2}}) {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{2|Elites}} drop 35-45 ({{Asc|3|26-34|2}}) {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{2|Bosses}} drop 100 ({{Asc|3|75|2}}) {{KW|Gold||2}}.

=== Ancients ===
* {{KW|Neow||2}}
* {{KW|Nonupeipe||2}}

=== Relics ===
* {{R|Old Coin||2}}: Upon pickup, gain 300 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Maw Bank||2}}: Whenever you climb a floor, gain 12 {{KW|Gold||2}}. No longer works when you spend any {{KW|Gold||2}} at the shop.
* {{R|Amethyst Aubergine||2}}: Enemies drop 10 additional {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Bowler Hat||2}}: Gain 20% additional {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}}: Whenever you add a card to your Deck, gain 15 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Cursed Pearl||2}}: Upon pickup, receive {{C|Greed||2}}. Gain 333 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Golden Pearl||2}}: Upon pickup, gain 150 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Signet Ring||2}}: Upon pickup, gain 999 {{KW|Gold||2}}.

=== Chests ===
Give 42-53 ({{Asc|3|32-40|2}}) {{2|Gold}} in addition to a {{2|Relic}}.

=== Cards ===
* {{C|Hand of Greed||2}}: Deal 20 (25) damage. Gain 20 (25) {{KW|Gold||2}} when {{KW|Fatal||2}}.
* {{C|Royalties||2}}: At the end of combat, gain 35 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{C|Spoils Map||2}}: Gives an extra 600 {{KW|Gold||2}} at a {{2|Map_Locations#Treasure_Room|Treasure Chest}} in the next {{2|Acts|Act}}.

=== Events ===
* 

== Interactions ==

=== Positive ===
* {{R|Scroll Boxes||2}}: Gain a card pack in exchange for all {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Bing Bong||2}} in combination with {{R|Lucky Fysh||2}} gains an extra 15 {{KW|Gold||2}} per card added. {{2|Transforms}} counts as a card added.
** Allows gaining {{KW|Gold||2}} at {{2|The Merchant}} by buying cards that are cheaper than 30 {{KW|Gold||2}}.
* {{R|Dragon Fruit||2}} increases max HP by one every time you gain {{KW|Gold||2}}. This also synergizes with Lucky Fysh/Bing Bong mentioned above.
* {{R|Membership Card||2}} and {{R|The Courier||2}} increases the effective value of {{KW|Gold||2}} by making prices at {{2|The Merchant}} cheaper.

=== Negative ===
* {{R|Seal of Gold||2}} continually loses {{KW|Gold||2}} every turn for the rest of the game. 
* {{R|Ectoplasm||2}} will stop all future {{KW|Gold||2}} gain. 
* {{C|Debt||2}} loses 10 {{KW|Gold||2}} if it is in your Hand at the end of your turn.
